pr.title: Label some previously unknown AObj functions and add structs
pr.author: PsiLupan

summary: Labeled several previously anonymous baselib AObj/animation traversal routines and propagated the new symbols through assembly callsites and jump tables. The PR renamed func_80364C08 to HSD_ForeachAnim, func_803645D8 to callbackForeachFunc, func_803646F4 to TObjForeachAnim, and func_80364768 to RObjForeachAnim, then added supporting enum types for AObj argument formats and HSD object type IDs.
what_changed: Renamed asm function func_80364C08 to HSD_ForeachAnim in src/sysdolphin/baselib/aobj.c and updated many assembly callsites across fighter, game, ground, menu, camera, and text assembly files.
Renamed func_803645D8 to callbackForeachFunc and gave it an evidence-backed prototype: HSD_AObj *aobj, void *obj, HSD_Type type, void (*func)(), AObj_Arg_Type arg_type, FObjData *arg.
Renamed func_803646F4 to TObjForeachAnim and func_80364768 to RObjForeachAnim, including internal branch calls inside aobj.c.
Updated asm/data.s jump table entries from func_803645D8 and func_80364C08 offsets to callbackForeachFunc and HSD_ForeachAnim offsets, preserving the same offsets.

Added AObj_Arg_Type enum in aobj.h with values AOBJ_ARG_A, AOBJ_ARG_AF, AOBJ_ARG_AV, AOBJ_ARG_AU, AOBJ_ARG_AO, AOBJ_ARG_AOF, AOBJ_ARG_AOV, AOBJ_ARG_AOU, AOBJ_ARG_AOT, AOBJ_ARG_AOTF, AOBJ_ARG_AOTV, and AOBJ_ARG_AOTU.
Added HSD_Type enum in object.h with object type IDs AOBJ_TYPE through CBOBJ_TYPE plus HSD_MAX_TYPE.
Updated include/functions.h comment labels for callbackForeachFunc, TObjForeachAnim, RObjForeachAnim, and HSD_ForeachAnim.
smart_moves: The label propagation was broad rather than local: once func_80364C08 was identified as HSD_ForeachAnim, all visible assembly callsites and jump-table references were updated, making future decompilation searches much more useful.
The PR paired naming with type scaffolding. Adding HSD_Type and AObj_Arg_Type made the new callbackForeachFunc prototype more meaningful than a bare symbol rename.
Jump-table entries were updated using the new function names while preserving exact relative offsets, which improves readability without changing layout-sensitive assembly behavior.
The chosen names distinguish generic traversal, callback dispatch, and object-specific traversal helpers: HSD_ForeachAnim, callbackForeachFunc, TObjForeachAnim, and RObjForeachAnim.
decomp_lessons: When an unknown baselib routine is called from many unrelated game systems with repeated patterns around HSD_AObjSetRate, HSD_AObjSetCurrentFrame, HSD_AObjReqAnim, HSD_AObjStopAnim, and HSD_JObjAnimAll, it may be a generic animation traversal helper rather than subsystem-specific logic.
After identifying a central library function, update assembly callsites, jump tables, and header declarations together so future matching work can rely on the symbol consistently.
Enums for argument formats and object type IDs can turn opaque integer arguments into decompilation clues, especially for variadic or callback-driven traversal functions.

Names in baselib should preserve HSD prefixing for public-ish library functions such as HSD_ForeachAnim, while helper callbacks may use descriptive non-HSD names when evidence suggests internal scope.
For still-asm functions, improved prototypes are useful even before full C decompilation; they document inferred calling convention and expected argument roles.
naming_conventions: Public baselib functions use HSD_ prefix and Pascal-ish object abbreviations, e.g. HSD_ForeachAnim.
AObj-related enum type is named AObj_Arg_Type, with constants prefixed AOBJ_ARG_.
HSD object type enum is named HSD_Type, with constants ending in _TYPE, e.g. JOBJ_TYPE, ROBJ_TYPE, TOBJ_TYPE.
Object-specific traversal helper names use object abbreviations plus ForeachAnim, e.g. TObjForeachAnim and RObjForeachAnim.
The helper callback was named callbackForeachFunc rather than leaving the address-style func_803645D8 placeholder.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Updated branch labels in assembly callsites from bl func_80364C08 to bl HSD_ForeachAnim without altering instruction bytes or addresses.
Updated jump table base symbols in asm/data.s from func_80364C08 + offsets to HSD_ForeachAnim + the same offsets, and from func_803645D8 + offsets to callbackForeachFunc + the same offsets.
Kept aobj.c functions as asm bodies but renamed the function declarations and internal branch targets, allowing symbolic clarity before full matching/decompilation.
Used observed literal type values passed to callbackForeachFunc and traversal code to support HSD_Type enum values such as JOBJ_TYPE = 6, ROBJ_TYPE = 10, TOBJ_TYPE = 11, and WOBJ_TYPE = 12.
review_feedback: No issue comments, review comments, or review records were present in the provided PR slice, so there is no direct reviewer feedback to extract.
follow_up_queries: Find later PRs that fully decompile HSD_ForeachAnim or callbackForeachFunc.
Search for uses of AObj_Arg_Type constants to confirm callback argument format meanings.
Search for HSD_Type enum refinements or additions after PR 212.
Look for later renames of func_803647DC and func_80364924 in baselib/aobj.c.
Check whether TObjForeachAnim and RObjForeachAnim prototypes were later filled in with typed arguments.
